ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Consignee name appears truncated due to field length limitation.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF. All fields legible. Contains header branding 'Ekman' with logo.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The remarks field contains 'Invoice no. 46188985' which is a commercial invoice reference, not an LC reference. No field labelled 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', 'Documentary Credit' or similar exists in the certificate.

occurrences_in_invoice.context: Company logo/branding at top of invoice page
Ekman & Co AB, Polhemsplatsen 5, PO Box 230, SE-401 23 Gothenburg, Sweden
Signatory block at bottom of invoice

consignor_search_all_files.conclusion: Consignor name 'Ekman & Co AB' found in multiple locations in the invoice file: header branding, issuer address block, and signatory footer.

criteria_met.details: Certificate remarks: 'Invoice no. 46188985'. Invoice header: 'INVOICE NO: 46188985'. Exact match.
Certificate consignor 'Ekman & Co AB' matches invoice issuer 'Ekman & Co AB'.
Certificate consignee 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li' identifiable as 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited' in invoice SOLD TO field.

pairing_validation.motivation: All three pairing criteria are met. Document pair is valid.

candidates.raw_text: Plot No.621-622, Phase IV, G.I.D.C., Naroda, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 382330
candidates.normalized_text: plot no.621-622, phase iv, g.i.d.c., naroda, ahmedabad, gujarat, 382330

candidates.raw_text: Polhemsplatsen 5, PO Box 230, SE-401 23 Gothenburg, Sweden
candidates.normalized_text: polhemsplatsen 5, po box 230, se-401 23 gothenburg, sweden

candidates.raw_text: Plot No.621-622, Phase IV, G.I.D.C., Naroda, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 382330, India
candidates.normalized_text: plot no.621-622, phase iv, g.i.d.c., naroda, ahmedabad, gujarat, 382330, india

candidates.raw_text:
Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240
"RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP"
114 Bales
26.433 ADMT AT USD 1 200.00/ADMT
candidates.normalized_text: domsjö cellulose quality 2240 rayon grade wood pulp 114 bales 26.433 admt

candidates.raw_text: We hereby certify that this invoice is true and correct and that the goods are of Swedish origin.

consignor.certificate_value: Ekman & Co AB, Polhemsplatsen 5, P.O. BOX 230, SE-401 23, Gothenburg, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Ekman & Co AB, Polhemsplatsen 5, PO Box 230, SE-401 23 Gothenburg, Sweden

comparison_steps.description: Check if consignor name appears anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH – 'Ekman & Co AB' appears in invoice issuer block, header branding, and signatory footer

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignor name with invoice issuer name
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Ekman & Co AB', Invoice: 'Ekman & Co AB' — exact match after normalization
Certificate: 'Sweden', Invoice: 'Sweden' (explicit in address block) — exact match. Additionally confirmed by VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556020459501.

rules_applied.description: Group structure – consignor name found in invoice issuer block
Country verification via VAT prefix SE

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Ekman & Co AB' located in Sweden. Invoice issuer is 'Ekman & Co AB' at the same address in Sweden. Exact name match, exact country match. VAT number SE556020459501 confirms Swedish registration. No normalization needed beyond case-insensitive comparison.

consignee.certificate_value: Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li, Plot No.621-622, Phase IV, G.I.D.C., Naroda, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 382330, India
consignee.invoice_value: Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited, Plot No.621-622, Phase IV, G.I.D.C., Naroda, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 382330, India

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: SOLD TO field found: 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited'

comparison_steps.description: Certificate shows 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li' which appears truncated (ends mid-word). Invoice shows full name 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited'.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate text 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li' is an exact initial prefix of the invoice's 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited'. The truncation occurs at 'Li' which is the beginning of 'Limited' — clearly a field/layout truncation. No other entity with similar name exists in the invoice. Country matches (India = India).
Certificate: 'India', Invoice SOLD TO: 'India' — exact match

rules_applied.description: Priority identification – SOLD TO is the primary billing field
Layout truncation – certificate name is exact prefix of invoice name, truncation due to field limitation

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li' — the name ends abruptly at 'Li', strongly suggesting layout/field truncation. The invoice SOLD TO field shows 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited'. The certificate text is an exact initial prefix of the full name. All 4.2.2.1.1 conditions are met: (1) exact prefix, (2) obvious layout truncation (name ends mid-word), (3) no other similar entity in invoice, (4) country matches (India). Address details also match exactly: Plot No.621-622, Phase IV, G.I.D.C., Naroda, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 382330.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: The truncated name 'Private Li' could refer to a different entity
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The full address matches exactly, the name is a perfect prefix, and no other entity with a similar name exists in the invoice. The truncation at 'Li' (beginning of 'Limited') is a classic field-length limitation pattern.

goods_description.invoice_value:
Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240
"RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP"
114 Bales
H.S. Code: 470200

comparison_steps.description: Check if article numbers are present in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No dedicated article numbers found in certificate. HS Code 470200 is present in both documents but is a customs classification code, not an article number. Proceed to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.step: 4.3.3 – Controlled text matching: Identify core product designation
comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in the certificate goods description
comparison_steps.result: The identity-bearing main designation is 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240'. This is the specific product name that uniquely identifies the goods.

comparison_steps.description: Check if 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240' can be found in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice DESCRIPTION column contains 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240' — exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice contains additional text 'RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP' which is a supplementary product classification. Certificate does not contain this text.
comparison_steps.result: This is additional descriptive text in the invoice that does not alter the product identity. Per rule 4.3.4, this does not cause MISMATCH.
Exact match on package count and type.
Exact match after normalization of spacing in 'H.S.Code' vs 'H.S. Code'.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240' found exactly in invoice
Non-identity-bearing additions – 'RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP' in invoice is supplementary, does not change product identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: The certificate describes the goods as 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240' with '114 Bales' and 'H.S.Code: 470200'. The invoice contains the exact same product name 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240', the same package count '114 Bales', and the same HS code '470200'. The invoice additionally contains 'RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP' as a supplementary classification which does not alter product identity per 4.3.4. No article numbers are used; verification succeeded via Priority 2 (controlled text matching).

evidence.raw_text:
Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240
"RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP"
114 Bales

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'GW: 25 650 KGS'. This is the verification-grounding quantity.
Certificate specifies both numeric value (25 650) and unit (KGS). Weight category (GW) is explicitly stated.
comparison_steps.result: All requirements met: numeric value, unit, and weight category present.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate value '25 650' uses space as thousands separator. Normalized to 25650.
Invoice states 'Gross Weight: 25 650 KGS'. After normalization of space thousands separator: 25650 KGS.
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: GW 25650 KGS. Invoice: Gross Weight 25650 KGS. Exact match on numeric value, unit, and weight category.

rules_applied.description: Thousands separator normalization – space removed from '25 650'
Direct identification – 25650 KGS GW found in invoice

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7 states 'GW: 25 650 KGS'. The invoice states 'Gross Weight: 25 650 KGS'. After normalizing the space thousands separator (rule 4.4.3.3), both values are 25650 KGS. Weight category matches: GW (Gross Weight) in both documents. Unit matches: KGS in both. Exact match achieved via direct identification (main rule 4.4.1). No calculation or undantag needed.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: the goods are of Swedish origin

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin declaration in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains: 'We hereby certify that this invoice is true and correct and that the goods are of Swedish origin.' This is an explicit origin declaration.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'Sweden'. Invoice: 'Swedish origin'. Normalize 'Swedish' → 'Sweden' (adjectival form of country name is a standard normalization).
comparison_steps.result: Sweden = Swedish origin → MATCH after normalization

comparison_steps.description: Certificate lists one origin country (Sweden). Invoice declares one origin (Swedish). No mixed origins.
comparison_steps.result: Single origin, no per-article verification needed.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified via explicit declaration: 'goods are of Swedish origin'
Normalization – 'Swedish' is the adjectival form of 'Sweden'

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3 states origin as 'Sweden'. The invoice contains an explicit origin declaration at the bottom: 'We hereby certify that this invoice is true and correct and that the goods are of Swedish origin.' The adjective 'Swedish' is a standard linguistic form of 'Sweden' and is permitted under normalization rule 4.5.4 (minor spelling/form variations). Single origin – no mixed origin complications. Clear MATCH.

evidence.raw_text: We hereby certify that this invoice is true and correct and that the goods are of Swedish origin.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate
Document A is certificate (ICC Certificate of Origin), Document B is invoice (Commercial Invoice from Ekman & Co AB). Single certificate, single invoice. Standard pairing.
PASSED – All three criteria met: invoice number match (46188985), consignor match (Ekman & Co AB), consignee match (Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited).
MATCH – 'Ekman & Co AB' found directly as invoice issuer
MATCH – exact name match, exact country match

rule_evaluation_log.description: Country verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix)
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Confirmed – VAT prefix SE in SE556020459501 confirms Sweden
SOLD TO field identified as primary billing field
MATCH – 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li' is exact prefix of 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited', truncation at field boundary
No article numbers in certificate. HS code is not an article number.
MATCH – 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240' found exactly in invoice
'RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP' in invoice is supplementary – no MISMATCH

rule_evaluation_log.description: Direct identification of quantity in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH – 25650 KGS GW in both documents

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren Ekman & Co AB i Sverige bekräftas av fakturan. Mottagaren Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited i Indien identifieras i fakturans SOLD TO-fält (certifikatets namn är avkortat på grund av fältbegränsning men matchar som prefix). Varubeskrivningen Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240, bruttovikten 25 650 KGS och ursprungslandet Sverige bekräftas samtliga av fakturan.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor: exact match. Consignee: match via layout truncation rule (certificate name is prefix of full name in invoice). Goods description: exact text match on product name. Quantity: exact match on GW 25650 KGS. Country of origin: Sweden verified via explicit origin declaration in invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li, Plot No.621-622, Phase IV, G.I.D.C., Naroda, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 382330, India
sections.invoice_value: Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited, Plot No.621-622, Phase IV, G.I.D.C., Naroda, Ahmedabad, Gujarat, 382330, India
sections.rule_applied: Layout truncation – certificate name is exact prefix of invoice name
sections.motivation: Certificate consignee name 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Li' is truncated due to field limitation — the text is an exact initial prefix of 'Amishi Drugs & Chemicals Private Limited' in the invoice SOLD TO field. The truncation occurs at 'Li' (start of 'Limited'), consistent with layout/field truncation. Full address matches exactly. Country India matches. No other entity with similar name in the invoice. All conditions of rule 4.2.2.1.1 met.

sections.invoice_value:
Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240
"RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP"
114 Bales
H.S. Code: 470200
sections.rule_applied: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation found exactly in invoice
sections.motivation: Identity-bearing main designation 'Domsjö Cellulose Quality 2240' found exactly in invoice description. Package information '114 Bales' matches. HS code 470200 matches. Invoice additionally contains 'RAYON GRADE WOOD PULP' which is a supplementary classification not present in the certificate — this is additional information per rule 4.3.4, not a contradiction.

sections.rule_applied: Direct identification with thousands separator normalization
sections.motivation: Certificate box 7: GW 25 650 KGS. Invoice: Gross Weight 25 650 KGS. After normalizing space thousands separator, both are 25650 KGS. Weight category GW = Gross Weight. Exact match on value, unit, and weight category.

sections.invoice_value: the goods are of Swedish origin
sections.rule_applied: Origin normalization – adjectival form 'Swedish' equivalent to 'Sweden'
sections.motivation: Certificate box 3 states 'Sweden'. Invoice contains explicit origin declaration: 'We hereby certify that this invoice is true and correct and that the goods are of Swedish origin.' The adjectival form 'Swedish' is the standard linguistic form of 'Sweden', permitted under normalization rule 4.5.4. Single origin — no mixed origin issues.

output_quality_checks.notes: All applicable checkpoints are MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.95. Overall comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent. Workflow recommendation AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result.
